title: Mofusand Plush Banana Man Toy, 16inch Weird Banana Man Doll with Magnet, Funny Poseable Decompression Toy Stuffed Animals Doll Gifts for Boys Girls Birthday Party Christmas (Yellow)
features: 【Dynamic Poseable Plush Doll】The Banana Man Doll features flexible steel wires in its arms and legs, allowing for endless posing possibilities and is very good at imitating the human posture. You can change the posture of the Banana Man according to your preferences.
【Funny Magnetic Palm Adventures】With a magnetic buckle in its hands, the banana plush toy can cling to iron objects, making it capable of climbing and exploring. Endless fun awaits!
【Size】Length: 40cm/16inch" (Including leg). The unfolded size of both arms is 18cm. Clothes can be taken off, easy to clean. His funny expression and posture will make adults laugh.

【Best Decompression Plush Toy】The Decompression Banana Plush Toy is a great way to help you de-stress. No matter how unhappy you are, your mood will get better when you see him, because the banana man always reminds you that he is the most depressed.
【Vacuum Packing】The banana man plush is vacuum packed, it may be slightly wrinkled when you first receive it, please pat it hard.
description: Product description Item Name: Banana Man Stuffed Doll Toy Material: Cotton Length: 40cm/15.75" (Including leg)(Approx.) The size after bent its knees: 6inches. Notes: Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. Please allow slight dimension difference due to different manual measurement. Package Includes: 1 x Banana Man Stuffed Doll Toy Safety Warning no applicable
